global_description: A medium-sized bird with a compact body and short tail, predominantly green with distinctive white spots. It has a rounded head, short beak, and bright red eyes. The plumage is glossy, giving it a sleek appearance.

part_details.head: Rounded, green with red eyes and a short beak.
part_details.body: Compact, covered in green feathers with white spots.
part_details.eyes: Bright red, contrasting with green feathers.

spatial_relations: The head is positioned at the front of the compact body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
